name: Belcando Dog Dry Food – Lamb & Rice 1kg
description: This carefully crafted formula contains 75% animal protein of total protein content, sourced from high-quality lamb and poultry. The inclusion of nutrient-rich chia seeds supplies essential Omega-3 and Omega-6 fatty acids while promoting healthy digestion through natural mucilage. Selected herbs, linseed, and brewer's yeast further support overall wellbeing, immunity, and vitality. With moderate protein and fat levels, BELCANDO Adult Lamb & Rice is perfectly suited for adult dogs with normal activity levels, helping maintain an ideal body condition while providing sustained energy throughout the day. Key Benefits . Ideal for sensitive dogs with digestive sensitivities . Made with fresh lamb and highly digestible rice . 75% animal protein of total protein content . Chia seeds support healthy digestion and skin health . Rich in essential Omega-3 & Omega-6 fatty acids . Supports a healthy immune system and overall vitality . Moderate protein and fat content for normal activity levels . Free from unnecessary fillers and formulated with carefully selected ingredients Premium Ingredients Rice (40%), fresh lamb meat, liver and lung (30%), dried poultry protein, lamb protein, oat flour, grape seed expeller, brewer's yeast, chia seeds (1.5%), linseed, hydrolysed poultry liver, poultry fat, natural herbs, yucca schidigera and essential minerals. Nutritional Analysis Crude Protein: 23.0% Crude Fat: 12.5% Crude Fibre: 3.2% Crude Ash: 7.0% Moisture: 10.0% Calcium: 1.6% Phosphorus: 1.0% Why Choose BELCANDO Adult Lamb & Rice? If your dog requires a gentle, highly digestible diet without compromising on taste or nutrition, BELCANDO Adult Lamb & Rice delivers premium-quality ingredients and balanced nutrition in every meal. Its carefully selected recipe supports digestive comfort, healthy skin and coat, strong muscles, and overall wellbeing, making it an excellent choice for sensitive adult dogs.
